name: Hamburger Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil noodles in water until cooked through.
2. Cook celery in 1 cup of water.
3. Brown hamburger and onions together.
4. Pour noodles, celery, and liquid into a casserole dish (2 to 3 quart size).
5. Add mushroom soup, tomato soup, and grated cheese. Reserve enough cheese for sprinkling on top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
7. Serve with green salad and hot biscuits.
Note: This recipe appeared in the Waycross (Georgia) Journal-Herald 17th Annual Cookbook, Friday, November 16, 1990 and was submitted by Ms. Dorothy Strayer of Patterson, Georgia.
